step_rationale: ROS-generating enzyme driving endothelial dysfunction and lipid oxidation in atherogenesis.
mechanism: NADPH oxidase generates superoxide driving lipid oxidation and endothelial dysfunction, destabilizing plaques.

references.title: Is there a clinical role for oxidative stress biomarkers in atherosclerotic diseases?
Impact of oxidized low density lipoprotein on vascular cells.
Pharmacological approaches to improve endothelial repair mechanisms.
